places.name: Gardaland
places.description: Italy's largest theme park — roller coasters, water rides, SEA LIFE aquarium. Mon Jun 29 weekday visit; ~20 min from Desenzano.

places.name: CanevaWorld Aqua Paradise
places.description: Water park with extreme slides and pools — Wed Jul 1; ~25 min from Desenzano. Also Gardaland rain backup.

places.name: Movieland Park
places.description: Movie-themed rides and stunt shows — indoor rain backup near CanevaWorld resort.

places.name: Monte Baldo Cable Car
places.description: Rotating cable car from Malcesine — panoramic views; Option B for Tue Jun 30 vs Verona.

places.name: Paragliding Tandem (Monte Baldo)
places.description: Tandem flights from Monte Baldo — book ahead; minimum age typically 16 with guardian.

places.name: Malcesine
places.description: Scaliger castle, Punto Panoramico, Palazzo dei Capitani — combine with Monte Baldo cable car (Tue Jun 30 Option B).

places.name: Bergamo Upper Town
places.description: Funicular to the upper town — Old Square, cathedral, Venetian walls. Fri Jun 26 drive stop.

places.name: Castellaro Lagusello
places.description: Medieval hamlet and small lake loop — listed among Italy's most beautiful villages; Sat Jun 27 morning, ~35 min from Desenzano.

places.name: Manerba — Self-Drive Boat Rental
places.description: Rent a small family boat from Manerba marina (no license, up to 40 HP). Sun Jun 28 — ~40 min from Desenzano, book ahead.

places.name: Vittoriale degli Italiani
places.description: Eccentric poet's estate with a warship in the garden — quirky indoor backup west of the lake.

places.name: Verona Arena
places.description: 1st-century Roman amphitheater — Tue Jun 30 Verona day trip (Option A).

places.name: Sirmione — Scaligero Castle
places.description: Medieval castle on the peninsula — Thu Jul 2 morning; keep visit short if teens prefer the spa.

places.name: Aquaria Thermal Spa
places.description: Lakeside thermal pools — group booking Thu Jul 2 afternoon; book in advance.

places.name: Borghetto sul Mincio
places.description: Medieval watermill village — riverside walk ~1 hr. Sat Jun 27 nature day, ~35 min from Desenzano.

places.name: Parco Giardino Sigurtà
places.description: Flat garden paths and flowers — gentle ~2 hr nature walk. Pair with Borghetto on Jun 27.

places.name: Peschiera del Garda
places.description: Fortress walls (UNESCO), canals, stilt houses, Mincio bike path — Wed Jul 1 after CanevaWorld (~45 min).

places.name: Serravalle Designer Outlet
places.description: Designer outlet shopping ~3 hrs — Fri Jul 3 en route to Milan.

places.name: Trattoria del Ponte
places.description: Lakeside trattoria on the Mincio — lake fish and tortellini. Day 3 Borghetto backup if you skip the main valley loop.

places.name: Ristorante Pace
places.description: Desenzano waterfront — fresh lake fish and risotto. Welcome dinner Fri Jun 26 evening.

places.name: Trattoria Al Pompiere
places.description: Classic Verona grill — grilled chicken. Tue Jun 30 lunch.

places.name: Locanda al Bersagliere
places.description: Sirmione castle area — lake-view lunch. Thu Jul 2.

places.name: Taverna del Silenzio
places.description: Famous Valeggio-style tortellini — book ahead! Sat Jun 27 lunch in Borghetto.

places.name: Ristorante Vecchia Malcesine
places.description: Pre-cable-car lunch in Malcesine old town. Tue Jun 30 Monte Baldo option.

places.name: Trattoria del Nuovo Macello
places.description: Milan farewell steak dinner. Fri Jul 3 evening. Alternative: Spontini pizza.

places.name: Bardolino
places.description: Lakeside wine town — promenade, walk to Garda, winery tastings. Day 7 Option B (~25 min from Desenzano).

places.name: Garda
places.description: Classic south-lake harbour village — lungolago walk, Punta San Vigilio nearby. Day 7 Option B (~30 min from Desenzano).

places.name: Lazise Historic Centre
places.description: Medieval walls, Scaliger castle, Wednesday market — same resort area as CanevaWorld. Day 7 Option A or B.

places.name: Rocca di Lonato
places.description: Hilltop fortress with lake panoramas — quick stop ~15 min from Desenzano. Optional spare evening.

places.name: Moniga del Garda
places.description: Castle ruins and lake beaches — teen swim option on the southwest shore (~15 min from Desenzano).

places.name: Limone sul Garda
places.description: Limonaia del Castel, cliffside cycle path, Porto Vecchio lemon sorbet — west shore (~1 hr from Desenzano).

places.name: Navigarda Lake Ferry
places.description: Hop-on hop-off ferry linking Desenzano, Sirmione, Peschiera, and north-lake towns — scenic summer alternative to driving.

places.name: Tibetan Bridge — Crero (Torri del Benaco)
places.description: Ponte Tibetano suspension bridge over Val Vanzana — easy–moderate 1.5–2 hr loop. East shore ~50 min from Desenzano.

places.name: Paganella — Canfedin & Monte Gazza traverse
places.description: Medium ridge hike from Cima Paganella cable car (Andalo): 5–5.5 hr, Dolomites & Garda views. Full day ~2 hr from Desenzano.

places.name: Torri del Benaco
places.description: East-shore port & Scaliger castle — start point for Tibetan Bridge hike.

places.name: Salò
places.description: West-shore promenade, MU.SA museum, Pasticceria Vassalli — optional spare afternoon (~45 min from Desenzano).

places.name: Padenghe sul Garda — pebble beach
places.description: Small tranquil pebble beach — picnic-friendly swim spot (~20 min from Desenzano).

places.name: Ottella Winery
places.description: Lugana wine tastings near Peschiera — indoor room, ideal on rainy days.

places.name: Isola del Garda
places.description: Private island villa boat tours May–October — book from south-lake ports.

places.name: Museo dell'Olio (Cisano)
places.description: Olive Oil Museum near Bardolino — short stop on a village day.

places.name: Desenzano del Garda
places.description: Base town — Tuesday market, harbour promenade, Archaeological Museum, welcome dinner at Pace.
